# Storage Guidelines

To maintain the longevity of products bought from Acme Shop, proper storage is essential, particularly for sensitive items like electronics, cosmetics, and textiles. Electronics should be kept in a cool, dry environment, ideally between 50°F and 77°F (10°C and 25°C) with humidity below 60% to prevent damage. Cosmetics need protection from heat and sunlight, while textiles should be stored in breathable bags to avoid dust, with regular rotation to minimize creasing. For larger items needing storage, customers can contact the customer service team for economical options.

[Source: product_care.md#storage-guidelines]
